FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Flags MA20 Support Amid Tariff‑Driven Fed Cuts
tldr_points: AI identifies bullish support at MA20 as technical momentum aligns with Fed cut expectations.
Rising US‑Japan rate divergence reinforces upside bias.
Tariff‑driven policy risk adds uncertainty, but current ordering flow favors buying.
FX.excerpt: AI flags bullish USD/JPY setup as tech shows support at MA20, RSI low, and tariff‑driven Fed cuts loom. in Asian session.
FX.comment: AI‑confirmed bullish setup with strong risk‑reward profile.
